## Stop

Please do not disclose suspected vulnerabilities in a public issue.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting for this repository, or contact the maintainers through the security policy if private reporting is not available.

Do not attach real vault files, passwords, keys, recovery material, or exploit details to a public issue.
